hero.title: Everything You Need for Better Healthcare
hero.description: From AI-powered symptom triage to emergency ambulance dispatch, NeronaHealth provides every tool you need to navigate Nigeria's healthcare system with confidence.

sections.title: AI-Powered Triage
sections.description: Describe your symptoms naturally. Our AI analyzes urgency and recommends the right care within seconds.

features.title: Symptom Analysis
features.description: Describe your symptoms in natural language. Our AI analyzes urgency, identifies potential conditions, and recommends appropriate care pathways.

features.title: Urgency Detection
features.description: AI identifies red flags and critical symptoms that require immediate attention. Know when to seek emergency care versus routine appointments.

features.title: Care Type Recommendation
features.description: Get personalized recommendations on whether to visit a clinic, hospital, or call for emergency services based on your symptoms.

sections.title: Hospital Discovery
sections.description: Find verified hospitals near you with real-time capacity information. Compare services and make informed decisions.

features.title: Verified Hospitals
features.description: Access a curated network of vetted healthcare facilities. Quality assurance, verified accreditations, and transparent service listings.

features.title: Real-Time Capacity
features.description: See current wait times, bed availability, and appointment slots. Make informed decisions before traveling to a hospital.

features.title: Direct Contact
features.description: Connect with hospitals directly through integrated calling and messaging. Get quick responses to your healthcare inquiries.

sections.title: Smart Appointments
sections.description: Book appointments with available doctors instantly. Choose your time, specialty, and preferred hospital.

features.title: Smart Scheduling
features.description: Book appointments with available doctors instantly. View calendars, specialties, and choose your preferred time slots.

features.title: Doctor Profiles
features.description: Browse verified doctors by specialty. View qualifications, experience, patient ratings, and hospital affiliations.

features.title: Automated Reminders
features.description: Never miss an appointment with SMS and in-app reminders. Manage your schedule with easy rescheduling options.

sections.title: Emergency Response
sections.description: One-tap emergency dispatch with real-time ambulance tracking. When every second counts, NeronaHealth delivers.

features.title: One-Tap Emergency
features.description: Instantly request emergency assistance. Connect with dispatchers and track ambulance location in real-time.

features.title: GPS Tracking
features.description: Real-time ambulance tracking. See ETA, route progress, and communicate directly with drivers during emergencies.

features.title: Coordinated Response
features.description: Dispatch system coordinates between patients, hospitals, and emergency responders. Life-saving efficiency.

sections.title: Digital Medical Records
sections.description: Secure cloud storage for your health history. Access, manage, and share your records with complete privacy control.

features.title: Digital Records
features.description: Secure cloud storage for your medical history. Access lab results, prescriptions, and visit notes anywhere, anytime.

features.title: Privacy Controls
features.description: Granular sharing permissions. Control who sees your records and for how long. HIPAA compliant security.

features.title: Provider Access
features.description: Instantly share your medical history with new doctors. No more carrying paper files between appointments.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Better Healthcare?
cta.description: Join thousands of patients and healthcare providers using NeronaHealth across Nigeria.
